raw_result.description: Work management platform with a REST API and an official MCP server for reading, analyzing, and managing Smartsheet data with AI.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official docs indicate both Direct API Access Tokens (personal access tokens) and OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow are supported.
raw_result.gating_reason: Evidence gathered from official getting-started docs indicates API access is available for Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plans, implying paid plan access rather than a clearly documented free self-serve tier for API use.

api_surface.breadth: Official developer portal and API reference document a broad REST API under base URL https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0 for Smartsheet platform operations; no official GraphQL endpoint was identified in the gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official Smartsheet MCP server docs exist, and the Smartsheet GitHub repo smartsheet-platform/smar-mcp is deprecated in favor of the hosted official MCP service/documentation.

raw_result.blocker: API access appears tied to paid Business/Enterprise/AWM plans rather than a clearly documented free self-serve API tier.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Gathered evidence indicates a standard limit of 300 requests per minute for the Smartsheet API, with X-RateLimit-* headers used to communicate limit status. Exact header names and wording should be re-verified on the official throttling page if needed.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official developer portal is active; official MCP documentation is published for Claude/ChatGPT-style clients; deprecated GitHub MCP repo points users to hosted official MCP service, which is a strong signal of current AI-agent support.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Access-tier details and exact rate-limit wording were concluded from browser-gathered summaries rather than directly quoted page text in-chat; verify the exact plan gating language and throttling header details on the cited official pages before publication.

result.description: Work management platform with a REST API and an official MCP server for reading, analyzing, and managing Smartsheet data with AI.
result.auth_notes: Official docs indicate both Direct API Access Tokens (personal access tokens) and OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow are supported.
result.gating_reason: Evidence gathered from official getting-started docs indicates API access is available for Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plans, implying paid plan access rather than a clearly documented free self-serve tier for API use.

api_surface.breadth: Official developer portal and API reference document a broad REST API under base URL https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0 for Smartsheet platform operations; no official GraphQL endpoint was identified in the gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official Smartsheet MCP server docs exist, and the Smartsheet GitHub repo smartsheet-platform/smar-mcp is deprecated in favor of the hosted official MCP service/documentation.

result.blocker: API access appears tied to paid Business/Enterprise/AWM plans rather than a clearly documented free self-serve API tier.
result.rate_limit_notes: Gathered evidence indicates a standard limit of 300 requests per minute for the Smartsheet API, with X-RateLimit-* headers used to communicate limit status. Exact header names and wording should be re-verified on the official throttling page if needed.
result.notable_signals: Official developer portal is active; official MCP documentation is published for Claude/ChatGPT-style clients; deprecated GitHub MCP repo points users to hosted official MCP service, which is a strong signal of current AI-agent support.
result.human_review_reason: Access-tier details and exact rate-limit wording were concluded from browser-gathered summaries rather than directly quoted page text in-chat; verify the exact plan gating language and throttling header details on the cited official pages before publication.
